name: Foreign Battleground Service
description: Wang Lin fights in the Foreign Battleground for Planet Suzaku. Earns merit but accumulates war karma.
_comment: Karmic Nexus node: Foreign Battleground Service. Per architectural review: RI is a novel about karma. karmic_weight is signed (+ = debt owed TO bearer, - = grudge held BY bearer). Prime Directive: unresolved karma persists objectively until paid.
